title: MCP tools 2025-06-18 conformance: outputSchema + annotations + tool description fixes (Rec#3 + Rec#6 + Rec#7)
description: Bring all 4 MCP tool definitions into MCP 2025-06-18 spec compliance: add outputSchema + annotations to all 4 tools, change fab_plan_context paths from min(1) to min(2) with disambiguation description, and replace MANDATORY language in fab_update_registry with conditional phrasing plus typed data schema. Reduces agent token waste and eliminates semantic overlap between fab_get_rules and fab_plan_context.

changes: Add outputSchema: { revision_hash: string, stale: boolean, rules: { L0: string, L1: string[], L2: string[], human_locked_nearby: string[] } }
Change response from createTextResponse(JSON.stringify(payload)) to structuredContent + text fallback
Add outputSchema: { revision_hash: string, stale: boolean, entries: Array<{ path: string, rules: object }> }
Append to description: 'Use fab_get_rules for single-file queries; use fab_plan_context for 2+ files.'
Add outputSchema: { success: boolean, timestamp: string, entry: object, compliance: { compliant: boolean, matched_get_rules_ts: string | null, window_ms: number } }
Change response to structuredContent including compliance field
Add outputSchema: { success: boolean, revision: string, updated_node: object }
Description: replace MANDATORY language with 'Call to add, remove, or update Fabric registry nodes. Use instead of editing .fabric/agents.meta.json directly.'
data field: z.record(z.unknown()) → typed schema z.object({ file: z.string(), scope_glob: z.string(), deps: z.array(z.string()).optional(), priority: z.number().optional() })

implementation: Read MCP SDK docs for outputSchema + structuredContent response pattern (check existing SDK version in package.json)
Define shared Zod schemas or TypeScript types for each tool's output shape in a co-located types file or inline
Update get-rules.ts: add outputSchema + annotations, change handler to return { content: [structuredContent, textFallback] }
Update plan-context.ts: outputSchema + annotations + paths.min(2) + description disambiguation
Update update-registry.ts: replace MANDATORY description, type data schema, add outputSchema + annotations
Update append-intent.ts: add outputSchema + annotations; compliance field wiring is handled by TASK-003 but add placeholder here for the field shape
Verify MCP server still starts and all 4 tools are discoverable by running the MCP inspector or an integration test

reference.pattern: MCP 2025-06-18 tool definition with outputSchema and structuredContent
reference.examples: Follow MCP SDK tool registration pattern already in use; add outputSchema as sibling to inputSchema in tool definition

rationale.chosen_approach: Single pass over all 4 tool files in one task to apply outputSchema + annotations uniformly
alternatives_considered: Separate tasks per tool (too granular, 4 × 10min tasks vs 1 × 40min)
Only outputSchema, skip description fixes (misses the semantic disambiguation value of Rec#6 and Rec#7)
decision_factors: All 4 tools share identical createTextResponse anti-pattern — one-shot fix is efficient
Rec#6 and Rec#7 are schema/description changes in tool files already being touched
No runtime behavior change risk — additions only (except paths.min change which is a validation tightening)
rationale.tradeoffs: paths.min(2) is a breaking change for any existing agent prompt that passes a single path to fab_plan_context — minimal risk since fab_get_rules is the correct single-path tool

risks.description: MCP SDK version may not support structuredContent in this project's pinned version
risks.mitigation: Check @modelcontextprotocol/sdk version; if < 2025-06-18 support, add outputSchema only and defer structuredContent response format
risks.fallback: Keep text response but add outputSchema declaration for schema-aware clients

criteria: All 4 tool definitions include outputSchema field matching specified shapes
All 4 tool definitions include annotations field
fab_update_registry data field accepts typed { file, scope_glob, deps?, priority? } shape
MCP server starts without error and all 4 tools appear in tools/list response
convergence.verification: pnpm test --filter server; start server and run: npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector stdio -- node dist/index.js; verify tools/list response includes outputSchema for all 4 tools
convergence.definition_of_done: An MCP-2025-06-18 compliant client can parse tool responses as structured data without JSON.stringify text guessing

unit: fab_update_registry: rejects data without required file and scope_glob fields
fab_update_registry: accepts data with optional deps and priority
manual_checks: Call fab_get_rules via MCP inspector and confirm response includes structuredContent
Call fab_plan_context with 1 path and confirm 400/validation error
Call fab_update_registry with old-style MANDATORY description — confirm new description via tools/list
success_metrics: 4/4 tools have outputSchema in tools/list response
0 occurrences of 'MANDATORY' in update-registry.ts description string

commit.message_template: feat(server/tools): MCP 2025-06-18 conformance — outputSchema, annotations, plan-context min(2), update-registry typed data
